_comment: Tier-2 for fenics linear_elasticity#3: XDMFFile.write_function requires the Function degree to match the mesh degree. P2 on P1 mesh raises RuntimeError 'Degree of output Function must be same as mesh degree. Maybe the Function needs to be interpolated?'. Verified empirically 2026-06-01.
expect_in_output: Degree of output Function must be same as mesh degree
